strategy: This is a 'wrong brother' fight: only attack the boss that has the Stun Shield. Casting spells at a boss without it makes Austri counter with Colossus for 460-540 Ice damage.
Check wards before every cast. If your target has no Stun Shield, pick again or pass.
Hit with Fire or Myth — Austri takes +35% from both. Never use Ice into his 80% resist.
He only has 2,110 health. One blade and a modest Fire or Myth hit on the correct target ends it — no long setup needed.
cheatNotes: Attacking a boss that lacks the Stun Shield triggers a 460-540 damage Colossus counter from Austri. Target only the Stun-Shielded boss and you never see this cheat.
